section_id: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer - License Validity Period
title: Validity Period of the License
content: It shall be valid for four (4) years from the date of issuance, unless sooner cancelled, revoked or suspended for violation of applicable Philippine law, these rules and other pertinent issuances.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
